name: table
description: 个人工作台应用 — React + FastAPI

scripts.ocr:dev: uv run --default-index https://pypi.org/simple --package table-ocr-service uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001 --reload
scripts.backend:dev:raw: uv run --default-index https://pypi.org/simple --package table-python-backend uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8787 --reload
scripts.backend:test: uv run --default-index https://pypi.org/simple --package table-python-backend pytest python-backend/tests -q
scripts.backend:test:unit: uv run --default-index https://pypi.org/simple --package table-python-backend pytest python-backend/tests -q -m "unit and not conventions"
scripts.backend:test:integration: uv run --default-index https://pypi.org/simple --package table-python-backend pytest python-backend/tests -q -m "integration and not startup"
scripts.backend:test:startup: uv run --default-index https://pypi.org/simple --package table-python-backend pytest python-backend/tests/startup -q -m startup
scripts.backend:test:conventions: uv run --default-index https://pypi.org/simple --package table-python-backend pytest python-backend/tests -q -m conventions
scripts.backend:test:ci: npm run backend:test:unit && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:RUN_PYTHON_INTEGRATION_TESTS='1'; npm run backend:test:integration; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm run backend:test:startup; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }" && npm run backend:test:conventions
scripts.ocr:test: uv run --default-index https://pypi.org/simple --package table-ocr-service pytest ocr-service/tests -q
scripts.lint:backend: uv run --default-index https://pypi.org/simple --package table-python-backend ruff check python-backend/app python-backend/tests
scripts.lint:ocr: uv run --default-index https://pypi.org/simple --package table-ocr-service python -m compileall ocr-service/main.py ocr-service/tests
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.check:conventions: npm run backend:test:conventions && npm run test:frontend-api
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run check:bundle-size && npm run test:frontend-api && npm run backend:test:ci && npm run ocr:test
